title: gossypium sturtianum
intro: Gossypium sturtianum, also known as the Sturt's Desert Pea, is a flowering plant that belongs to the cotton family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gossypium sturtianum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into a salve or ointment, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
